results.title: Stavtar selects Westfall
results.description: Greg Westfall has been chosen as head of strategic accounts at Stavtar

results.title: Eskom Restructuring Task Team outlines terms of reference for creation of TSO
results.description: The Eskom Restructuring Task Team (ERTT) has outlined the terms of reference guiding its deliberations on the establishment of an independent State-owned Transmission System Operator (TSO) that owns and controls the country’s transmission assets and is responsible for operating the electricity market. President Cyril Ramaphosa announced the establishment of the task team during his February State of the Nation Address, while reaffirming government’s support for a fully independent TSO.

results.title: Downside Risks Rise As Tech Volatility Spikes
results.description: Implied volatilities jumped across asset classes last week as markets grappled with rising US-Iran tensions, higher bond yields, and a sharp pullback in tech. Read more here.

results.title: Ministry of Industry obtains new powers to solidify foundations of sustainable development & diversify national economy
results.description: The Ministry of Industry and Minerals revealed yesterday that Tripoli Prime Minister, Abdel Hamid Aldabaiba, issued Decree No. (298) of 2026, establishing the “General Directorate for Industrial Regulation” within the organizational structure of the Ministry of Industry and Minerals. The Ministry of Industry and Minerals said the move embodies cohesive leadership and integrated institutional work. results.title: TN Committed to Creating Transparent, Policy-Driven environment for energy investors: Minister
results.description: Tamil Nadu government is committed to establishing a transparent, policy-driven environment for energy sector investors, emphasising the state's potential to become a leading hub for green hydrogen and offshore wind energy project development

results.title: Pak 'N Save 'Death by Chicken' burger recalled over safety concerns
results.description: The Ministry for Primary Industries said it was concerned about the possibility of the ironically named Pak 'N Save chicken being undercooked.

results.title: first export shipment of GI tagged Tezpur litchi from Assam to Dubai, milestone celebrated by Union Minister Piyush Goyal
results.description: তেজপুৰৰ লিচুৱে বিশ্বজনীন পৰিচয় লাভ কৰাৰ আশা কেন্দ্ৰীয় বাণিজ্য আৰু উদ্যোগ মন্ত্ৰীৰ ।

results.title: EDGE Markets secures $29.2m Series A from CoinFund
results.description: EDGE Markets, a financial services firm building infrastructure products for gaming, digital asset and prediction markets, has closed a $29.2m Series A funding round. The raise was led by CoinFund, with additional participation from Indicator Ventures, Mantis VC, Stepstone Group, and Bullpen Capital.
